TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_mslpyung, title = mslpyung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/mslpyung} }

S.FORM: lahi pinhmut kmal ga, mincway sumu balay, ita ga mslpyung ta qwa ra.
lahi pinhmut kmal ga, mincway sumu balay, ita ga mslpyung ta qwa ra.
S.PHON: laħi pinħmut kmal ɣa, minʦ~ʨwaj s~ɕumu βalaj, ita ɣa ms~ɕlpjuŋ ta qwa ra.
